questions.question: At present, India has opted out of which pillar of ‘Indo-Pacific Economic Framework (IPEF)’?
questions.explanation: The US and 13 other partner countries in the Indo-Pacific region launched the Indo-Pacific Economic Framework (IPEF) in Tokyo last year. The framework is centered around four pillars focusing on trade, supply chains, clean economy, and fair economy. India decided to opt out of the trade pillar and join the remaining three subjects of the IPEF. The US Commerce Secretary has expressed hope that the IPEF will have more economic impact than a free trade agreement with India.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry is set to host the ‘World Food India-2023’ event?

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Food Processing Industries will host the second edition of ‘World Food India-2023’ in November 2023 in New Delhi. WFI-2023 will focus on promoting India as a global food processing hub, highlighting culinary diversity, attracting investment, and exploring business opportunities. Five key elements of WFI-2023 include Millets, Innovation and Sustainability, White Revolution 2.0, Making India an export hub, and Technology and Digitization.

questions.question: Which company was awarded the ‘Bengaluru-Mysuru expressway’ project?
questions.explanation: The Bengaluru-Mysuru expressway project aims to reduce travel time between the two cities by constructing a six-lane road that is 10 metres wide. Prime Minister Modi recently inaugurated the Bengaluru-Mysuru expressway. It was developed at the cost of Rs 8,480 crore by the Union Ministry of Road Transport and Highway. The project was awarded to Dilip Buildcon. The 119 km-long expressway is expected to boost economic activity in the region.

questions.question: Which institution constructed the ‘INS Sahyadri’ Shivalik-class stealth multi-role frigate?
questions.explanation: ‘INS Sahyadri’ is a Shivalik-class stealth multi-role frigate constructed at the Mazagon Dock Limited (MDL) in Mumbai. It was commissioned on July 21, 2012, joining the Eastern Naval Command based in Visakhapatnam. INS Sahyadri recently participated in a two-day maritime partnership exercise with two French warships in the Arabian Sea.

questions.question: Thiania indica, which was discovered recently, belongs to which species?
questions.explanation: Thiania indica is a newly discovered species of jumping spider from the Western Ghats. Thiania indica belongs to the Thiania C.L. Koch genus of jumping spider (that constitute the family Salticidae). It was discovered during an expedition in the Shendurney Wildlife Sanctuary in December 2021.

questions.question: Urban Extension Road-2 Project (UER-II) is associated with which state/UT?
questions.explanation: The Urban Extension Road-2 (UER II) is an on-going project that will connect Alipur in north Delhi with the Delhi Jaipur Highway. The Union Road Transport Minister announced that the project will enable to transit from Delhi airport to Alipur in 20 mins It is expected to be inaugurated by the end of 2023.

questions.question: ‘Geoffrey Bawa: It is Essential To be There’ Exhibition was inaugurated to mark 75 years of bilateral relations between India and?
questions.explanation: “The Geoffrey Bawa: It is Essential To be There” Exhibition was inaugurated recently to mark 75 years of bilateral relations between India and Sri Lanka. It highlights the works of famous architect from Sri Lanka, Geoffrey Bawa. Born in 1919, he was one among the most influential Asian architects of his generation.

questions.question: Which country launched Falcon LLM, a large language model (LLM) with 40 billion parameters?
questions.explanation: Technology Innovation Institute, Abudhabi, UAE has launched Falcon LLM, a large language model (LLM) with 40 billion parameters. The model outperforms GPT-3 and requires only 75% of its training compute, as well as lower percentages of other large language models’ training compute. The UAE is aligned with the UAE’s National AI Strategy, which aims to make the country a leader in the knowledge economy, driving progress and prosperity.

questions.question: Which year has been proposed to be marked as the year of tourism?
questions.explanation: The SCO Tourism Ministers’ Conference was held recently in Varanasi. During this event, India mooted an action plan to mark this year -2023- as the year of tourism. Shanghai Cooperation Organization is an intergovernmental organisation currently comprising eight Member States – China, India, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Pakistan, Russia, Tajikistan and Uzbekistan.

questions.question: Which city is the host of ‘Civil20 India 2023 Inception Conference’?
questions.explanation: The three-day Civil20 India 2023 Inception Conference is set to be organized in Nagpur, Maharashtra. C20 India provides a platform for civil society organizations from across the world to highlight the aspiration of people to world leaders.
